name: JoAi: Log Contact Activity

title.en: Log an activity on a contact

description.en: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, email, task, or custom event.
description.de: Beliebige Aktivität bei einem Kontakt protokollieren – Notiz, Anruf, Meeting, E-Mail, Aufgabe oder benutzerdefiniertes Ereignis.

bot: Use this to log any interaction or touchpoint with a contact. Prefer specific types (call, email, meeting) over custom when applicable.

description.en: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.
description.de: Die ID des Kontakts, bei dem die Aktivität protokolliert werden soll.

inputs.name: Type

description.en: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, or custom.
description.de: Art der Aktivität: note, call, meeting, task oder custom.

inputs.bot: The activity type. Use 'note' for general observations, 'call' for calls, 'meeting' for meetings, 'task' for to-dos, 'custom' for anything else. For emails, messages are logged as Room messages instead — use the email-send or outreach warps.

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: A clear description of what happened or what was discussed.
